hero.name: Sk. Roushan Khalid
hero.philosophy: "AI/ML Engineer building applied machine learning models, robust APIs, and AWS cloud solutions."

about.lead: I am a Software Engineering graduate and an AI Engineer at Kamal-Paterson Ltd, designing applied ML systems and backend APIs hosted on AWS.
paragraphs: I build practical AI and software solutions in the agritech domain, bridging the gap between machine learning models and production applications.
My hands-on experience includes developing RAG pipelines, FastAPI backends, full-stack client apps (Flutter, React), and configuring Docker containers on AWS.
I focus on engineering rigour, continuous learning, and shipping clean, reliable code.

skills.title: Applied AI & Machine Learning
skills.description: Building machine learning and computer vision systems — from data preprocessing and training to production integration.

skills.title: LLM & Generative AI Applications
skills.description: Developing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems, multi-agent workflows, vector databases, and API integrations.

skills.title: Backend APIs & AWS Hosting
skills.description: Developing backend APIs and managing cloud deployment. Implementing FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker containers, and AWS EC2/S3 hosting.

timeline.title: AI Engineer · Kamal-Paterson Ltd / KPCloud
timeline.description: Developing backend APIs and full-stack agritech solutions. Built FastAPI services, offline-first Flutter mobile apps, and React dashboards, deployed via Docker on AWS.

timeline.title: Research Intern · Learnix Research Lab
timeline.description: Part-time applied ML research internship focused on bridging academic methodologies with practical implementations. Contributing to research on ML foundations and their translation into production-viable systems.

timeline.title: B.Sc. Software Engineering · Daffodil International University
timeline.description: Major in Data Science. Graduated with a CGPA of 3.62 / 4.00. Developed strong foundations in software engineering principles, data science, and applied AI systems. Active member of the Data Science Club, Software Engineering Club, and BASIS Students' Forum DIU Chapter.

approach.title: Practical AI over Innovation Theatre
approach.description: I focus on building practical AI systems that solve real problems. I prioritize clear simplicity and reliable backend APIs over complex, over-engineered setups.

approach.title: Build to Learn & Iterate
approach.description: The best way to understand systems is to ship them, stress-test them, and refine. Theory without production-ready deployment has limited value.

approach.title: Adaptability & Engineering Rigour
approach.description: I combine software engineering foundations (FastAPI, Flutter, PostgreSQL) with applied ML, focusing on consistent, disciplined growth.

contact.footerNote: Based in Dhaka, Bangladesh · Open to remote and onsite opportunities
